news.summary: Before the end of May 2025, Teamsters, along with other members of the Labor Alliance for Public Transit, gathered at Union Station in Chicago to call for legislative action in Illinois. The union coalition emphasized the need for state legislators to enhance the public transit system. The urgency of this demand is underscored by the approaching deadline, highlighting the importance of swift action.
news.headline: Illinois Teamsters and allies call on lawmakers to prevent cuts to public transportation before the month ends.

news.summary: Angie Brown has recently been appointed as the Executive Vice President (EVP) and Chief Information Officer (CIO) of The Home Depot®, the global leader in home improvement retail. This announcement was made on May 29, 2025. In her new role, Brown will oversee all components of the company's information technology operations.
news.headline: Home Depot appoints Angie Brown as EVP and CIO; in charge of company's information technology.

news.summary: Luxury custom homebuilder Royal Texan Homes, renowned for its historically inspired design and unwavering commitment to quality, has recently revealed a new partnership with Star Furniture, a respected Texas home furnishings brand with a 100-year legacy. The collaboration aims to combine Royal Texan Homes’ expertise in crafting exclusive homes with Star Furniture’s extensive experience in providing top-quality furnishings. This strategic alliance signifies a promising venture for both companies and is anticipated to enhance the homebuilding and interior design industry in Texas.
news.headline: Luxury homebuilder Royal Texan Homes partners with Star Furniture to enhance Texas living. Announcement made on May 29, 2025.
Fight for ownership of 7-Eleven valued at $1 billion captured in video segment.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Laser Photonics Corporation, a prominent industrial developer of CleanTech Laser Systems, disclosed that on May 22, 2025, it was notified by Nasdaq Listing Qualifications department of Nasdaq that they had not received LPC's Form 10-Q for the period ending March 31, 2025. The company's stock trades under the symbol LASE on NASDAQ.
news.headline: Laser Photonics (NASDAQ: LASE) faces delisting notice from Nasdaq due to failure to submit Form 10-Q for 1Q25.
Sempra to export up to ~13.5mtpa LNG to non-FTA nations

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Petrus Resources Ltd. (TSX: PRQ) based in Calgary, Alberta, released its latest monthly activity update. The information is available on the company's website at https://www.petrusresources.com/monthlyupdates.
news.headline: Petrus Resources Ltd. in Calgary released its monthly activity update for May 2025 on their website.

news.summary: WeRide Inc. (NASDAQ: WRD) is seeing a boost in premarket trading as a result of its first-quarter financial report, showcasing $10 million in total revenue for Q1 of 2025, indicating a 1.8% increase compared to the previous year. Jennifer Li, the CFO of WeRide, attributed this growth to enhanced commercial traction, driven by expansions and new installations in the Middle East and Europe. The product revenue surged to $1.3 million due to heightened sales of their robotaxis and robosweepers during the quarter. WeRide's robotaxi division contributed $2.2 million to the first-quarter revenue, accounting for 22.3% of the total revenue, a significant rise from 11.9% in the same period last year. Check the full report for more details.
news.headline: WeRide Inc. (NASDAQ: WRD) sees shares rise in premarket after Q1 results, $10M revenue, with robotaxi revenue at $2.2M.
Sempra Port Arthur LNG development receives US Department of Energy export approval

news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has decided to withdraw from a current legal dispute involving cryptocurrency exchange Binance and its CEO Changpeng Zhao. The regulatory body is seeking to dismiss the litigation, marking another instance of the SEC stepping back from a case related to the crypto industry.
news.headline: SEC drops lawsuit against Binance and CZ as court filing reveals withdrawal from ongoing crypto case.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Sempra Infrastructure, a subsidiary of Sempra (NYSE: SRE), revealed that the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) granted a permit for the Port Arthur LNG Phase 2 project. This permit permits the export of around 13.5 million tonnes per year.
news.headline: Port Arthur LNG Phase 2 granted permit to export 13.5M tonnes, following DOE approval. Sempra Infrastructure subsidiary.

news.summary: In response to the developing wildfire situation in northern Manitoba, Hudbay Minerals Inc. is collaborating with local authorities to guarantee the safety of its employees in accordance with the regional wildfire evacuation order impacting Flin Flon and nearby regions. Only essential Hudbay personnel, authorized by emergency services, will continue operations in Flin Flon to aid in emergency efforts. Despite the closure of the 777 mine in 2022, Hudbay maintains care and maintenance activities in Flin Flon and provides support services for the Snow Lake operations, including concentrate handling, fabrication shops, and administration. Having been an integral part of Hudbay's operations for nearly a century, the Flin Flon community holds significant historical importance.
news.headline: Hudbay Minerals Inc. is aiding in wildfire response in Manitoba, ensuring staff safety and supporting emergency activities in Flin Flon.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Magnera Corporation (NYSE: MAGN) revealed its participation in the 2025 Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference in Chicago, Illinois. During the event on June 11, 2025, at 3:45 p.m. CT, Magnera's CEO Curt Begle and CFO & Treasurer Jim Till will engage in a fireside chat. Institutional investors will also have the opportunity to attend 1x1 meetings with the company on June 11-12, 2025.
news.headline: Magnera Corp (NYSE: MAGN) to present at Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conf in Chicago on June 11, 2025 at 3:45pm CT. CEO Begle and CFO Till to attend. 1x1 investor meetings on June 11-12, 2025.

news.summary: On race day in 2025, Verizon reported the highest data usage compared to any other event in the United States, showcasing the increasing reliance on mobile data. This surge in data consumption highlights the growing demand for connectivity, with users utilizing a significant amount of data on this single day. Verizon's data usage numbers on race day surpassed those of all other events across the country, underlining the importance of a robust network infrastructure to support such high data traffic.
news.headline: Verizon's data usage at Indy 500 outshines all U.S. events in 2025, making it the top in data connectivity.

news.summary: NVIDIA is set to make appearances at upcoming financial events, as announced on May 29, 2025, in Santa Clara, California. The company will participate in presentations and discussions tailored for the financial community. The presentations aim to shed light on NVIDIA's performance and future prospects, serving as key opportunities for investors and analysts alike.
news.headline: NVIDIA to present at financial community events soon. No further details provided.

news.summary: Cytek has unveiled the Cytek Aurora™ Evo system, a upgraded full spectrum flow cytometer building upon the success of its predecessor, the Cytek Aurora.
news.headline: Cytek introduces the Cytek Aurora™ Evo system, advancing flow cytometry with improved capabilities.

news.summary: Tarsus Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TARS, based in Irvine, California, disclosed on May 29, 2025, that its management intends to take part in forthcoming investor conferences.
news.headline: Tarsus Pharma (TARS) to participate in investor conferences, California, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: FlexShopper has been notified by Nasdaq that it is not in compliance with filing requirements due to delayed SEC filings. Nasdaq regulations require companies to promptly file periodic reports with the SEC. Failure to comply could result in delisting from the exchange. FlexShopper has been given a deadline to submit a plan to regain compliance. The company's share price has decreased by X% in response to this news. FlexShopper's recent financial reports indicate revenue of $X million and a net loss of $X million in the last quarter. Despite the challenges, FlexShopper remains optimistic about its future prospects and is working diligently to meet regulatory obligations.
news.headline: FlexShopper collaborates with ICON Vehicle Dynamics for lease-to-own financing, facing Nasdaq notice for delayed SEC filings.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, a prominent private markets solutions provider named P10, Inc. (NYSE: PX), shared news about its subsidiary RCP Advisors. RCP Advisors is a private equity investment firm specializing in granting access to North American small buyout fund managers. The firm successfully concluded fundraising for its latest primary fund-of-funds, RCP Fund XIX, LP, also known as Fund XIX. This development showcases the Company’s commitment to expanding its portfolio and facilitating investments in the private equity sector.
news.headline: RCP Advisors Closes Fund XIX on $314 Million

news.summary: In the after-hours session, UiPath Inc (NYSE: PATH) shares rose following the release of its first-quarter results, surpassing expectations. Q1 revenue stood at $356.62 million, exceeding estimates of $332.87 million. Adjusted EPS for Q1 was 11 cents, higher than the anticipated 10 cents. Total revenue saw a 6% increase from the previous year. Annual recurring revenue reached $1.69 billion as of April 30, marking a 12% yearly growth. The automation company reported $119 million in cash flow from operations and $117 million in adjusted free cash flow. UiPath closed the period with $1.59 billion.
news.headline: UiPath stock soars after Q1 earnings beat and raised guidance. Q1 revenue: $356.62M, EPS: 11 cents. Annual recurring revenue: $1.69B.

news.summary: In New York, Schrödinger, Inc. disclosed that they granted inducement equity awards to Mannix Aklian, their new EVP, Chief Commercial Officer, and Global Head of Software Sales & Marketing. Mr. Aklian, who commenced his role on May 28, 2025, received the awards under the 2021 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan. These grants, approved by the compensation committee of the board of directors, were allocated in accordance with the company’s guidelines. Schrödinger, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SDGR.
news.headline: Schrödinger grants stock options to new Chief Commercial Officer, Mannix Aklian, who joined on May 28, 2025. (Total Stock Grant not mentioned)

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Bombardier Inc. finalized the issuance of $500 million in Senior Notes due 2033. These newly issued notes, which carry a 6.750% annual coupon rate, will mature on June 15, 2033, and were sold at par value.
news.headline: Bombardier closes issuance of $500M Senior Notes due 2033 with a coupon rate of 6.750%, maturing on June 15, 2033 at par.

news.headline: MiniLuxe reports strong Q1 2025 financial results with continued revenue and gross profit growth.

news.headline: Osisko Metals reveals voting outcomes of its annual and special meeting for shareholders held today.

Allen's role will involve overseeing sales operations and he will report directly to senior management.
news.headline: Pivot Bio names Daryl Allen VP of Sales with 30+ years experience. ST. LOUIS, May 29, 2025. Allen to report directly...

news.summary: Officials from the Trump administration have been provided with another opportunity to cut connections with China. They plan to initiate a trade war, enforce export controls, and cancel student visas. This move aims to create a rift between the two nations and potentially impact economic relations.
news.headline: Trump aims to reduce US-China ties by renewing trade war, imposing export controls, revoking student visas. #Decoupling

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Houston, Silver Star Properties REIT, Inc., a real estate investment trust, shared three crucial updates with shareholders. The company, transitioning into the self-storage sector, is self-managed.
news.headline: Silver Star Properties REIT releases two podcast interviews on self-storage strategy amid repositioning efforts, addressing Allen Hartman's recent letter.

news.summary: Today, in Mexico City on May 29, 2025, FIBRA Prologis, a prominent owner and operator of Class-A industrial real estate in Mexico, disclosed the restructuring of its unsecured sustainable credit facility. This move includes enhanced terms, higher capacity, and the initiation of a new...
news.headline: FIBRA Prologis boosts financial flexibility with increased credit facility and new term loan in Mexico.

news.summary: In Birmingham, Ala., Medical Properties Trust, Inc. (NYSE: MPW) declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share of common stock. The dividend will be paid on July 17, 2025, to stockholders of record on June 18, 2025. Medical Properties Trust, Inc. is a self-advised real estate investment trust established in 2003, focusing on acquiring and developing net-leased hospital facilities.
news.headline: Medical Properties Trust declared a $0.08 quarterly dividend per share, payable on July 17, 2025, to stockholders of record on June 18, 2025.

news.summary: Ulta Beauty, Inc. released its first-quarter results, showing a quarterly earnings per share of $6.70, surpassing the consensus estimate of $5.77 by 16.12%. The company's quarterly revenue reached $2.85 billion, exceeding the Street estimate of $2.79 billion. Net sales for the quarter saw a 4.5% increase to $2.8 billion from $2.7 billion, driven by growth in comparable sales and new store contributions, partially offset by a decrease in other revenue. Comparable sales also increased by 2.9% compared to the first quarter of fiscal 2024.
news.headline: Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ: ULTA) Q1 report exceeds expectations with $6.70 EPS and $2.85B revenue, up 4.5% from last year. Stock rises.

news.summary: Zscaler Inc (NASDAQ: ZS) released its Q3 financial results, surpassing expectations. The company reported $678.03 million in revenue, beating the consensus estimate of $666.86 million. Adjusted earnings were 84 cents per share, also exceeding analyst predictions of 75 cents per share. Total revenue saw a 23% increase year-over-year, with deferred revenue rising by 26% to $1.99 billion. Calculated billings grew by 25% to $784.5 million. Cash flow from operations in the quarter reached $211.1 million, while free cash flow was $119.5 million. These figures show a slight decrease from the prior quarter's $123.1 million. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Zscaler surpasses Q3 earnings with $678.03M revenue, beats estimates, and raises guidance; invested more in AI.

news.summary: Pan American Silver Corp. has unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report, showcasing the company's initiatives in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) aspects. The report, available soon in Spanish and Portuguese, highlights Pan American's achievements, such as a significant decrease in water consumption by more than 220,000 cubic meters compared to the 2024 base figure. This demonstrates the company's commitment to sustainable practices and responsible resource management.
news.headline: Pan American Silver Corp releases 2024 Sustainability Report, highlighting over 220,000 m3 water use reduction.

news.summary: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, on May 29, 2025, Kane Biotech Inc. (TSX-V:KNE) - also referred to as Kane or the Company - disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Kane Biotech reports first quarter 2025 financial results.
